12345.name: Favorite Human ✨
12345.letter:
You know what's honestly annoying?

How easily you became part of my everyday thoughts 😭

Like...

somehow random things keep reminding me of you.

Songs.
Late-night silence.
Even stupid memes.

And despite all our chaos...

you still became one of the safest people in my life.

Which feels suspicious honestly.

Also please remember:

if I bully you too much...
that's unfortunately my version of affection ✨

67890.name: Midnight Problem 🌙
67890.letter:
I still think it's funny...

how we started as random conversations.

And now somehow...

you became one of those people I genuinely wait to talk to.

Even on exhausting days.
Even during weird moods.

You're strangely comforting.

Which is honestly rude.

And yes...

this is your official reminder to stop overthinking every tiny thing 😭

Some people stay.

You don't always have to panic about losing them ✨

push123.name: pushkala
push123.letter:
To Someone Who Makes Ordinary Days Better 🤍

I don't know if you'll ever realize this, but there are some people who unknowingly make someone else's day a little brighter. ☀️

You're one of them.

Sometimes it's the way you smile. 🌼
Sometimes it's how calmly you speak.
Sometimes it's just the way you carry yourself.

There isn't one specific reason.

You're simply... you. 🌸

It's funny how the smallest moments become the ones that stay in memory. A random conversation, a silly joke, a few minutes of laughter, or just seeing someone happy. ✨

You probably won't remember those moments.

But someone else might. 🤍

I hope life always gives you reasons to smile, because somehow your smile has a way of making the people around you smile too. 🌷

Stay kind.

Stay soft.

Stay exactly the way you are. 🌿

The world needs more people like that. 💛

— Someone who quietly appreciates your presence. 🤍
